# CrownyCode — Quick Start

## Install
```bash
bash install.sh
```

## Generate Your First Code
```bash
crownycode gen "create an HTTP server" -t rust
crownycode gen "create a sort function" -t python -o sort.py
```

## View Code Explanations
```bash
crownycode gen "create an HTTP server" -t rust --explain
```

## Compound Requests
```bash
crownycode gen "read user input and save to database via API" -t rust
```

## View Available Intents
```bash
crownycode intents
```

## Tutorial
```bash
crownycode tutorial
```
